title: Tunisian Tagine Chicken
description: A hearty and flavorful dish from Tunisia, made with tender chicken, aromatic spices, and a rich sauce. Serve with couscous or crusty bread.

ingredients.name: tunisian spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the spices, broth, and tagine sauce. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
Transfer the tagine to the oven and bake at 300°F (150°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and crusty bread on the side.
